geopolitics_summary: Iran war disrupts Hormuz; EU softens methane rules under US pressure; Italy pivots to Libya gas; trade tensions rising.

themes.headline: Italy seeks Libyan gas to offset Iran war supply shortage
themes.why_it_matters: Iran war disrupts regional supply. Libya pipeline to Italy is slow to ramp; TTF faces sustained tightness if diversification stalls. Direct exposure to southern European gas curve.

themes.headline: EU weakens methane enforcement rules under US pressure
themes.why_it_matters: Looser methane rules may reduce upstream discipline, increasing leakage and upstream opex competition; indirect upward pressure on gas procurement cost and TTF volatility.

themes.headline: US Strategic Petroleum Reserve releases 17.5M barrels since March
themes.why_it_matters: SPR releases weigh on crude; if sustained, lowers Brent and thus LNG spot arbitrage margin to Europe. Monitors TTF-Brent linkage and NW European LNG import incentive.

themes.headline: Trump vows to reopen Strait of Hormuz; France deploys carrier
themes.why_it_matters: Hormuz reopening reduces oil transport risk premium; lower Brent eases LNG arb into Europe. France's Suez transit signals EU hedge on supply corridor; monitors crude–gas spread and TTF.

themes.headline: EU blocks Huawei solar funding; Chinese renewable tech scrutiny escalates
themes.why_it_matters: Huawei solar ban slows EU capacity build; reduced renewable supply growth props long-term power curve. Delays in utility-scale PV projects sustain baseload thermal exposure and power spreads.

watchlist: Hormuz corridor reopening timeline; daily oil/LNG flow updates (TTF, Brent arb)
EU methane rule exemption rollout; when countries invoke 'energy security' carve-out
Libya gas ramp-up milestones; Italian demand signal on southern hub premium
SPR drawdown pace; crude floor implications for LNG forward curve through Q3
